title: National Crime Agency Remuneration Review Body report: 2025
text:
This report sets out the 
NCARRB
’s analysis of evidence given by relevant organisations and makes recommendations on pay in the NCA from 1 August 2025. The Government responded to the report that was laid before Parliament in a letter to the Chair of the Home Affairs Select Committee.
description: National Crime Agency Remuneration Review Body report: 2025
